## Fixed
- **Browser-tab favicon now actually changes (issue #12, take 2).** v1.1.3 overwrote
  the wrong files. The web UI is served by the **kclient** wrapper on top of KasmVNC,
  and the tab icon is its **`/favicon.ico`** (the page has no working
  `<link rel="icon">`, so the browser falls back to `/favicon.ico` =
  `/kclient/public/favicon.ico`) — not the inner KasmVNC client icons that v1.1.3
  replaced, which the tab never loads. v1.1.4 overwrites the real
  `/kclient/public/favicon.ico` with a proper Krusader `.ico` (plus the kclient
  `icon.png` and the inner client icons), and the build now **asserts on the real
  file** so CI catches any future regression.

After updating, hard-refresh the tab (Ctrl+F5) or open a new one so the browser
drops the cached `/favicon.ico`. Thanks again to **@omarahmed786** for the detailed
testing that pinpointed this.
